programme.desc: Michael meets a mysterious woman at a Valentine's blood drive. Dwight and Kevin pair up with single women at the office 'Lonely Hearts Party.' Meanwhile, Jim and Pam are banished from the office for being too publicly affectionate.

programme.title: The Office: Golden Ticket

programme.title: The Office: New Boss

programme.title: The Office: Two Weeks

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: Summer Of Terror (Part 1)
programme.desc: The summer of 1985 was one of the hottest Los Angeles had seen in a century. But terrified residents weren't sleeping with the windows open, they weren't sleeping at all. A killer was on the loose. He was the Night Stalker.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: I WIll Be Avenged (Part 2)
programme.desc: A tip from a teenage boy leads to the identity of the Night Stalker. Twenty-four hours later a mob of angry citizens track him down and capture him.

programme.title: Very Scary People: BTK: Bind, Torture, Kill

programme.title: Very Scary People: BTK: The Taunting

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)

programme.title: Very Scary People: Zodiac Killer: I Am The Zodiac

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: The Duke of Death

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: I Am A Monster
programme.desc: In 1977, the city of New York was being stalked by a seemingly faceless serial killer known as, 'Son of Sam.' But after his final shooting took him to Brooklyn, a twist of fate and a little luck led to his capture.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Life and Limb Too
programme.desc: A pregnant woman's leg pain turns out to be flesh-eating virus, threatening life and limb.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Ice Cold Mom
programme.desc: A grown man screams constantly; a young mother is alert but ice cold; a young boy seems to have overdosed on drugs. All these cases are medical mysteries, requiring life-saving solutions.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Clueless!
programme.desc: When a man believes he is constipated, he visits the ER only to find out his condition is much worse. A young woman experiences cardiac arrest and the doctor finds she's treating two patients in one. Also, a patient's family is entirely clueless.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Headaches and Zombies
programme.desc: A violent patient who cannot be sedated endangers a pregnant ER doctor. An unexplained headache turns life threatening for a mom during a vacation, while a man with a fencepost through his torso jumps the triage line on a busy night in the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Twists and Turns
programme.desc: An ER doctor must determine if a convicted murderer is faking paralysis as part of a prison escape plan, a father is dying after being stabbed in the heart protecting his son and a college cheerleader is in cardiac arrest after a night out.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Diagnose Me!/ In and out of Flatline/ Like a Virgin
programme.desc: A teen is bleeding internally from an ectopic pregnancy, but denies ever having sex, so her doctor must find a clever way to treat her. A young mother mysteriously goes in and out of flatline. A patient is healthy, but refuses to leave the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Chocolate Pudding
programme.desc: Meet a psychiatric patient who has an extreme love of chocolate pudding, while another patient in anaphylactic shock may be allergic to his girlfriend. Meanwhile, a man with a bizarrely swollen face must be convinced to get treatment.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Crowbar in the Head/ Sewn-in Bride/ Worms!
programme.desc: A crowbar is impaled in a man's skull. A bride refuses to take off her wedding dress to be examined.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Before the Pop: A Growth to Remember

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Before the Pop: Video Chat, Pop, Splat

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Hips Don't Lie

programme.title: The Profit: Tumbleweed Tiny Homes

programme.title: The Profit: Swim by Chuck Handy

programme.title: The Loud House: Left in the Dark/ Get the Message
programme.desc: Lincoln races his siblings to the couch in order to watch his favourite TV show. Lincoln must delete an angry voicemail from Lori's phone so she doesn't hear it.

programme.title: The Loud House: ARGGH! You For Real?/ Garage Banned
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde find out that ARGGH! is coming to town and decide to go to the taping. Tired of her siblings, Lori moves to the garage, but quickly finds it's more than she bargained for.

programme.title: The Loud House: Overnight Success/ Ties that Bind
programme.desc: Lincoln invites Clyde to a sleepover, but gets jealous when Clyde wants to hang out with his sisters. After eavesdropping on his parents, Lincoln thinks they have decided to get rid of their kids.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Butterfly Effect/ The Green House
programme.desc: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household.

programme.title: The Loud House: One of the Boys/ A Tattler's Tale

programme.title: Mom: Zombies and Cobb Salad

programme.title: Mom: Belgian Waffles and Bathroom Privileges
programme.desc: Christy has trouble accepting how much easier life is with Bonnie in the house. Meanwhile, Baxter sets up camp in the driveway.

programme.title: Mom: Cotton Candy and Blended Fish
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie go above and beyond to help a sick friend. Meanwhile, Violet is frustrated by the realities of pregnancy.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Tries to Write a Wrong

programme.title: George Lopez: George Says I Do... More in This Marriage

programme.title: George Lopez: The Kidney Stays in the Picture

programme.desc: When the scariest roller coaster ever opens at Bikini Bottom's amusement park, SpongeBob and Patrick are determined to ride it. But the more they think about it, the less they want to do it. Later, Plankton tricks SpongeBob into fixing the Chum Bucket.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Welcome to Chum Bucket/ Frankendoodle

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Blackened Sponge/ Mermaidman vs. Spongebob
programme.desc: SpongeBob punches himself in the face, but tells everyone that he fought off a thug.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Graveyard Shift/ Krusty Love
programme.desc: The Krusty Krab is now open 24 hours a day; Mr. Krabs is smitten with Ms. Puff.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Keep Bikini Bottom Beautiful/ A Pal for Gary
programme.desc: Squidward cleans up the city of Bikini Bottom with 'help' from SpongeBob. SpongeBob brings Gary a pet that terrorizes him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: House Sittin' for Sandy/ Smoothe Jazz at Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: All is quiet while SpongeBob is house-sitting for Sandy - until Patrick shows up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Porous Pockets/ Choir Boys
programme.desc: Patrick finds himself alone when SpongeBob becomes the richest citizen in Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: FarmerBob/ Gary and Spot

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pet or Pests/ Komputer Overload
programme.desc: SpongeBob adopts a stray worm, which soon gives birth to a litter of baby worms.

programme.desc: An anchor gets lodged into Squidward's window and SpongeBob, Pat and Squidward all climb the rope to see who is responsible.

programme.desc: Patrick introduces SpongeBob to his society of dullards and doofuses. /Patrick takes his grime to a new level, playing around in the trash so much that he's unrecognizable.

programme.desc: SpongeBob visits his old pal Bubble Buddy's hometown Bubbletown. Sandy invites Karen and Mrs. Puff out for a night on the town, so the ladies decide to blow off some steam.

programme.desc: The place that Plankton usually dumps his rotten chum is too full, so he tricks SpongeBob into hiding it around the city.

programme.title: The Loud House: Present Tense/ Any Given Sundae

programme.desc: Lincoln plots to take the "perfect" family photo for his parents' anniversary gift. Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: This Place Is Nuts
programme.desc: When Justin gets sick, Keith, Ashlee, and Duke have to decide on their own whether or not to take on this house without a kitchen.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: To Nightmare Manor
programme.desc: The crew answers a call at a haunted house. While they search for the source of the fire, each of them is forced to confront their greatest fears.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Talkoma: A Christmas Story
programme.desc: Kevin Heffernan and Steve Lemme take viewers behind the scenes of Tacoma FD.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.desc: Five good friends and former teammates reunite after their high school basketball coach passes away.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Where's the Bathroom?

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Let the Record Show
programme.desc: Adam Ray steps out of a time machine, Brad Williams almost makes his head explode in a rant about airplanes, and Sarah Tiana reveals how Brad gets a waiter's attention.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Made Me Laugh
programme.desc: Vanessa Fraction spots a 70's sitcom star in the crowd, Rojo Perez makes an inappropriate exit, and Tone Bell reads a crowd member's mind.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Demo Crazy
programme.desc: Sara Schaefer knows what not to say in a search party, Joel Kim Booster explains why your grandpa doesn't trust him, and Yassir Lester knows all about Joel's longest relationship.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Ronnie Jordan Headlines
programme.desc: Headliner Ronnie Jordan brings the heat tonight and is joined by funny woman Jade Catta-Preta as she shares the secret to relationship success. Plus, Blaq Ron gets a salsa lesson.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Chaunte Wayans
programme.desc: Comedians bring their hilarious personal stories to life with a reinvention of stand-up.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Music
programme.desc: It's time to face the music, as Adam reveals the racism behind rock & roll's origins and the egregious fees of Live Nation's monopoly. He then defends musicians who 'sell out' to make a living in today's digital landscape.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Night Out
programme.desc: Adam and Emily prepare for a big night out by revealing the marketing ploy that led to women shaving and the fashion agendas that created pockets. Then, the two friends pour back the truth on alcohol consumption.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Games
programme.desc: Adam hits pause on the myth that connects video games to real-life violence, and reveals that Monopoly was a rip-off of an anti-capitalist teaching game. Plus, Olympic organizers get rich while athletes struggle to get by.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Movie: Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Two government agents are brought together by the President to track down an evil genius.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: What to Do While You're Waiting
programme.desc: The future of the Panthers' season is out of their hands as they wait for the result of a game between two opponents that will ultimately determine their fate. Emotions intensify as the Street family carries on with their lawsuit against Coach Taylor.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Little Girl I Wanna to Marry You
programme.desc: With playoffs just around the corner, everyone works hard to get their heads in the game. Meanwhile, Smash's mother finds something in his room that could potentially end his dreams of playing football.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Upping the Ante
programme.desc: The stakes are high on and off the field as the players prepare for their first playoff match. Coach Taylor struggles between preparing for the game and dealing with the situation with Smash as the town of Dillon piles on the pressure.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Blinders
programme.desc: After their first victory in the playoffs, the Panthers feel invincible, until Mac makes racial statements that test the team's bond. Tim and Billy adjust to having their father in their lives while Tami worries about Julie's new friendship with Tyra.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Black Eyes and Broken Hearts
programme.desc: Racial tensions are at an all time high as the black players on the Dillon Panthers won't play unless Mac McGill is fired for his racial comments.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: I Think We Should Have Sex
programme.desc: The Panthers are deep into the playoffs and all players feel untouchable. Julie drops a bomb on an unsuspecting Matt when she says she's ready to have sex for the first time.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Extended Families
programme.desc: Buddy Garrity moves in with the Taylors and Lyla turns to Jason.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Ch-Ch-Ch-Ch-Changes
programme.desc: With TMU knocking on Coach Taylor's door, Julie decides to make it very clear to her parents that she does not want to move away from Dillon and Matt. Meanwhile, Jason receives some devastating news from the quad rugby recruiters in Austin.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Mud Bowl
programme.desc: Coach Taylor feels the players are losing their grasp on the beauty of the game of football.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: Coach Taylor makes a rash decision after he's pressured by Texas Methodist University. Elsewhere, Riggins deals with his new inappropriate relationship with the single mother next door, and Jason moves into a new apartment.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: State
programme.desc: It's all come down to this one final game: the Dillon Panthers are gearing up for the state championship. And all eyes are on Coach Taylor as everyone speculates as to whether or not Coach is going to leave Dillon for his dream job at TMU.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Last Days of Summer
programme.desc: The defending state champions, the Dillon Panthers, hope to have another successful season. Eric Taylor begins his career as head coach at TMU and immediately feels the hardship of being separated from his family when his wife goes into labour.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Bad Ideas
programme.desc: While Tami finds it difficult being the mother of a newborn and a teenager simultaneously, the kids embark on a school year filled with new beginnings.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Are You Ready for Friday Night?
programme.desc: Brian and Matt's problems, both on and off the field, continue to get the best of them. Coach Taylor returns to see his old players and old team in shambles. Meanwhile, Tim faces a scary situation, and Jason investigates alternatives treatments.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Backfire
programme.desc: Documentarians join a scientific expedition to Antarctica, as researchers race to understand and study the devastating effects of climate change.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Let's Get It On
programme.desc: After too much time away from Tami and the new baby, Eric Taylor decides to return to Dillon High to coach football.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: How Did I Get Here?
programme.desc: When key evidence implicates Landry, he comes clean with his father.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Pantherama
programme.desc: Brain finds himself facing a tough decision as college football recruiters come to town. Meanwhile Matt finds himself attached to his grandma's live-in nurse.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Seeing Other People
programme.desc: Brian 'Smash' Williams goes on his first recruiting trip that lives up to everything he hoped for until an unexpected incident takes place at the end that will change his mind about the school.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: The Confession
programme.desc: Landry confesses to the murder of Tyra's assaulter but continues to struggle with his conscience. Elsewhere, Jason Street contemplates his new future as Herc sets him up with an online dating service.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: There Goes the Neighborhood
programme.desc: A tornado hits the Dillon county area damaging Laribee High School, a rival school. Coach Taylor reluctantly welcomes Laribee, who will now share Dillon's weight room, football field and lockers.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Jumping the Gun
programme.desc: Brian Williams is facing pressure from many major colleges looking for a verbal commitment to their program and he has his heart set on only one. Elsewhere, tension is still high between Coach Taylor and Tim Riggins with regards to Julie.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Coach Taylor and his wife look into day care for Gracie. Meanwhile, Lyla Gerrity gets a job as a deejay on a Christian radio station. Elsewhere, Matt Saracen discovers that he is actually in love with his grandma's at-home nurse.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Humble Pie
programme.desc: Brian's confrontation at the movie theatre only gets worse when charges are laid against him. Tami Taylor is hired to be the head coach of the girl's volleyball team and turns to Tyra for help.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Leave No One Behind
programme.desc: Julie becomes jealous as Tami Taylor's relationship continues to blossom with Tyra. Matt finds himself in a rut when nothing really seems to matter to him anymore.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: East Coast Eatin'
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri checks in on some favorite East Coast eats. His first stop is a neighborhood joint that's still dishin' out diner classics from a cramped kitchen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Something Sweet
programme.desc: It's Diners, Drive-Ins, Dives and decadence with plenty of sweet to go along with the savory. First up, Guy Fieri's in Kansas City, Mo., where a brunch spot is serving up a vegan treat rich enough for any meat eater.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cosmopolitan Comfort
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing all kinds of cosmopolitan comfort food. In Portsmouth, New Hampshire, a righteous joint puts a New England spin on corned beef and cabbage, plus a fresh take on stroganoff.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers 'n More
programme.desc: Guy heads to California to a warehouse-turned-burger joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Amazing Appetizers
programme.desc: It is a first-course feast, as Guy Fieri digs into amazing appetizers. From Miami to Kansas to the Pacific Northwest, he grabs tots, jalapeno poppers, unique fritters, and even Rocky Mountain oysters.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwich Showcase
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's on the road to grab some serious sandwiches. In Austin, a rock-n-roll brunch bar adding a funky touch to meatloaf and a Monte Cristo. Plus, a Texas joint putting some '90s hip hop into their stacked-up specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cross-Country Classics
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's roadtrippin' all over the country for some home-style cooking. In Boston, the funky neighbourhood joint cranking out Southern staples, like chicken and waffles and off-the-hook tots.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Smothered and Covered
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is covering all things smothered, starting with some mole sauce masters in Salt Lake City. Then, in Florida, a diner is dishing out down-home comfort food like biscuits and gravy, and a joint in Reno, NV, is servin' up sweetbreads in style.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: To Bakersfield and Beyond
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's giving some love to a little town with a lot of flavor. In Bakersfield, Calif., the landmark Basque spot serving a four-course meal including outrageous oxtail and garlic fried chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Isle-Talian
programme.desc: Guy's diving into an island-Italian mashup. In Plymouth, Mass., a colourful joint dishes out a unique plantain sandwich and wings gone bananas. In Colorado Springs, a neighbourhood Italian spot serves up outrageous arancini and real-deal veal.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Breakfast, Brisket and Belly
programme.desc: Guy is in Los Angeles at a late-night spot with a twist, Columbus for a joint serving creative combos like brisket on corn flakes and Phoenix at a barbeque stop with smoked prime rib and pork belly dumplings.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bird and Beef
programme.desc: Guy's picking up everything from burgers to buns to bagels. In Portsmouth, an amped up deli serves up lights-out lamb burgers and righteous ribs. In Los Angeles, a Koreatown favourite loads up Asian buns and has a unique bacon-corn bar dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Retro
programme.desc: Guy Fieri rolls out to some legendary joints that will take you back in time: Taylor's Automatic Refresher in St. Helena, California, an original 1940s take-out only burger joint; Byway Café in Portland and a Soda Shot and diner in Goshen, Indiana.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Smothered and Covered
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is covering all things smothered, starting with some mole sauce masters in Salt Lake City. Then, in Florida, a diner is dishing out down-home comfort food like biscuits and gravy, and a joint in Reno, NV, is servin' up sweetbreads in style.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grillin' and Smokin'
programme.desc: Guy experiences the unusual off the grill, such as a Thai twist on classic Texas bbq.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All San Diego, All the Time
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's heading to San Diego for some favorites, old and new. In Ocean Beach, Calif., Guy's hittin' up a legendary surfer spot for some righteous burgers with an old buddy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Southern Staples
programme.desc: Guy's traveling all over the country searching for a taste of the South.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Arizona All-Stars
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headin' Southwest for a flavor-filled tour of Scottsdale, Arizona. First, the real deal Italian market making an authentic beef specialty straight from the mother country.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Favorites With a Twist
programme.desc: Guy visits places with a new take on old favourites such as a huge caramel pecan roll.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Surf 'n' Turf Jackpot
programme.desc: Guy hits the surf 'n' turf jackpot in Mississippi and Oahu. He tries some tasty ribs, fritters as well as pork rinds.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Bowlful of Soul
programme.desc: In Charlotte, N.C., a down-home hangout dishes out low country favourites, like killer collard greens and standout shrimp and grits. In Las Vegas, a strip mall spot serves up both savoury and sweet crepe specialities.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Swiss, Sandwiches and Sausage
programme.desc: In Portland, Oregon, a standout spot servin' up specialties straight out of Switzerland. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a funky food truck dishing out grilled cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: American Classics
programme.desc: Guy Fieri searches out some classic joints including a 60-year-old diner in South Beach, a drive-in and the oldest restaurant in Memphis and a classic southern tea room from 1918.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Brrrooklyn Barbecue

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Patio Party: A Dip for Everyone
programme.desc: Valerie hosts a summer get-together. The menu includes grilled vegetables with avocado yogurt dip and tapenade aioli dip.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Farewell to Summer
programme.desc: Geoffrey Zakarian's No Cream-Creamed Corn, Marcela Valladolid's Grilled Corn and Poblano Salad, and Sunny Anderson's grilled Jumbo Shrimp with a 1-2-3 Glaze.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Grillin' and Chillin'
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood's nephew is coming in for a visit and is ready to chow down on a home-cooked barbecue meal. They have a great time catching up and chilling out with an old-fashioned menu that includes bacon BBQ nachos.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Oh, Fry Goodness!
programme.desc: Molly is sharing her most epic fried masterpieces, nothing tastes better than crispy, crunchy deliciousness. Oh fry goodness!

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 14
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is serving up easy, delicious Labor Day eats. There are Crispy Wings with Hot Honey Sauce and spicy Pimento Cheese Grits. For something sweet, Ree makes divine Peach Shortcakes and a refreshing Ginger Cherry Limeade Spritzer.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Chocolate Appreciation Day
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is saying thanks with chocolate, appreciating people on her very own chocolate appreciation day. She makes Mississippi mud cake and white chocolate macadamia nut cookies to start, followed by her easy chocolate tart.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Labor Day BBQ
programme.desc: The Kitchen caps off summer with the greatest recipes for a Labor Day BBQ. Geoffrey Zakarian starts with tips for making his pork roast sandwiches with spicy apricot mustard and Jeff Mauro highlights the last of a seasonal favourite.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Grilling Out With the Girls
programme.desc: Kardea Brown plans the perfect menu to celebrate the end of summer with her girlfriends. She grills Jerk Chicken and Pineapple Skewers along with Sweet and Savory Grilled Corn and makes Sweet Heat Baked Beans and frozen Spiked Mojito Pops.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Good Grilling
programme.desc: Ina Garten is fired up and sharing her advice for grilling and barbecuing like a pro. To start, hot coals work their magic on her Tuscan grilled Cornish hens, and she amps up the flavor on foolproof ribs with barbecue sauce.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Frozen Feats
programme.desc: Chefs must create an Asian stir fry using no more than five ingredients. In the second game, they are given an unusual grocery list with the items that must be used for their fun family meal.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Food Wheel Free-For-All
programme.desc: The chefs are taking a big spin around the market with three rounds of Food Wheel games! First, chefs spin the budget wheel to win a paltry $9.04 for their pork dish.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Grandma and Grandpa
programme.desc: Grandmas and grandpas try to get through Guy's Grocery Games by making their grandkids' favourite dishes with ten items or less. Then they will use a culinary slot machine to make a dinner classic before the remaining grandparents go old school.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Eight chefs who've never met partner to take on the market. Teams must first create a classic duo dish with a limited budget of $15 and incorporate a surprise ingredient.

programme.desc: Charlie adopts baby snakes despite the Bears thinking he's not ready for parenthood.

programme.desc: The bears decide to go to the gym to get in a good work out.

programme.desc: The Bears star in a reality TV show along with Griff, Tom, and Isaac.

programme.desc: The Bears discover a network of tunnels underneath the cave. They look to discover where they lead to and who dug them.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Lord of the Poppies
programme.desc: Grizz and the Poppy Rangers go camping on an island, but they soon find themselves deserted.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: The Mall
programme.desc: The Bears go the mall and encounter their human counterparts.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: The Mummy's Curse
programme.desc: The Baby Bears must return a mummy to its tomb or else they’ll be cursed forever.

programme.desc: The Baby Bears invent an imaginary friend, but the trouble he causes is all too real.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Band of Outsiders
programme.desc: A gang of streetwise kids takes Baby Ice Bear under their wing.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Christmas Movies
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, the Baby Bears defend a video store from getting robbed.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Tabes & Charlie
programme.desc: Tabes and Charlie team up to find Tabes’ missing dog, Kirk.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Braces
programme.desc: When the Bears go to the dentist, Panda gets braces.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Panda's Birthday
programme.desc: The gang try to get Panda's favourite K-pop band to play for his birthday as a surprise.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Wingmen
programme.desc: In order to get some sleep, the Bears help an annoying bird find a new mate.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Fire!
programme.desc: The praise Grizz gets for preventing a wild fire goes to his head.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Adopted
programme.desc: The Baby Bears get adopted by an eccentric millionaire and get to live in his mansion.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Ranger Norm
programme.desc: When Tabes leaves for a conference, the Bears have to deal with her substitute, Ranger Norm.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Pizza Band
programme.desc: The Bears get pizza at Papa Bear’s Pizza Cave and wind up replacing the place’s animatronic band. They’re such a hit that they go on tour!

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Our Stuff
programme.desc: After the bears play a little pick-up basketball, they go back to grab their stuff by the side of the court, only to find it's been stolen. They try to track down their stuff and end up cracking a giant case in the process.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Viral Video
programme.desc: The Bears think they have what it takes to make and star in a viral video, but when Nom-Nom decides that they don't, Grizz breaks into the koala's limo in an effort to change his mind.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Food Truck
programme.desc: The Bears open up a food truck after being disappointed by the food options available to them. In an effort to drum up business, they start selling their food to animals, until the animals go a little crazy.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Chloe
programme.desc: Chloe spends time with the bears in an effort to research them for an upcoming presentation. But when the bears sneak a peek at her very dry report, the bears decide to jazz it up with exaggerated 'facts' about themselves and their lifestyle.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Panda's Date
programme.desc: When a vendor at the farmer's market sticks Panda with an epipen, reviving him after an allergic reaction, Panda comes to in the arms of his dream girl. Panda tries to woo the woman, but his brothers get in the way.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Everyday Bears
programme.desc: It’s a normal day for the Bears. This means that Ice gets in a fight with a Roomba, Panda’s life gets turned upside down when a mouse invades his room and Grizz gets stuck in a tree. You know, everyday stuff for a bear.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Burrito
programme.desc: After a restaurant makes a bear-sized burrito, Grizz can't bring himself to eat such a work of art. He carries the burrito everywhere making it a new, and increasingly smelly, part of his life.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Primal
programme.desc: Grizz wants to know if the Bears have lost their survival instincts, so he purposefully gets the Bears lost in the deep forest.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Jean Jacket
programme.desc: The Bears discover a bedazzled jean jacket in a dumpster and quickly become enamoured with it. Initially the jacket seems lucky, but so much fighting erupts over who can wear the jacket that it's becoming a burden.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Nom Nom
programme.desc: When Nom Nom shows up on the Bears’ doorstep, dishevelled and deposed from his spot as cutest internet star ever after a recent meltdown, he enlists the Bears to help him regain his title.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Shush Ninjas
programme.desc: The Bears are fed up with the decay of etiquette at today’s theatres and take it upon themselves to be the police of the theatre. They sneak up like ninjas to shush people who ruin the movie for others with their bad manners.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: My Clique
programme.desc: Chloe, a child prodigy, finds it difficult to connect with her much older classmates. The Bears take her under their wing, showing her how to make great college friends.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Charlie
programme.desc: The Bears meet Charlie the Bigfoot when he signs up on a home-sharing website to spend a weekend with the Bears. Charlie is the worst possible houseguest for the Bears, and nearly destroys their house.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Brother Up
programme.desc: After Panda stumbles and accidentally scares a pack of wolves away in the process, the hierarchy of the Bears is disrupted. Suddenly, Panda has to become the alpha bear, and he and Grizz must deal with the consequences of Panda being leader.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: The Road
programme.desc: The three bears, on their way through the desert, come upon a giant warehouse; it’s like an Amazon fulfillment center. The Bears try to make this box-filled paradise their home.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Emergency
programme.desc: When Grizz comes home with a live crab, he thinks it can become a pet for the brothers to share. However, after the crab pinches Ice Bear's ear and won't let go, Panda and Grizz have to get their injured brother to the hospital, and fast.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Tote Life
programme.desc: When a hipster grocery store clerk shames the Bears for asking for plastic grocery bags, the Bears realize that eco-friendly tote bags are their way of gaining acceptance amongst the progressive people of the Bay Area.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Charlie and the Snake
programme.desc: Charlie throws a party to try and find a place for himself in the world, but ends up going on an adventure with the unlikeliest of animals: a wild snake.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Video Date
programme.desc: Panda and his brothers engineer an e-date so that Panda is able to show the best side of himself on the video chat.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Pet Shop
programme.desc: A Baby Bear episode, "Pet Shop" tells the tale of where the Baby Bears once lived. After a run-in with a video crew shooting a Sarah McLachlan-type animal adoption video they almost seize an opportunity to find a home separated from each other.

programme.desc: The Barone women pressure Ray and Frank to go with Robert to one of his therapy sessions.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Adam Bomb
programme.desc: When Erica gets inspired to put college on hold in favour of pursuing a singing career, Beverly is worried that she will be disappointed if her dream does not come true. Beverly puts Murray up to the task to have to talk with Erica about her future.

programme.title: Roseanne: Good Girls, Bad Girls
programme.desc: Darlene attends a rock concert with Molly, but is left to find her own way home when Molly meets a boy. Dan and Roseanne are worried sick when Darlene returns home hours late with an excuse they don't believe.

programme.title: Roseanne: Of Ice and Men
programme.desc: Dan takes to the ice to help D.J. win a position on the Junior Hockey League team, but D.J.'s position is generally on the floor. Meanwhile, Roseanne's patience is put to the test helping Jackie recover from a broken romance.

programme.title: Roseanne: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Dan is summoned to D.J.'s principal's office when he is caught with obscene reading materials - which he got from Darlene! Meanwhile, Roseanne learns a shocking secret when she presses Jackie about spending time with Fisher.

programme.title: Roseanne: War and Peace
programme.desc: Dan's in jail for beating up Jackie's boyfriend, Fisher, and Darlene relishes the moment when she has to bail him out. Meanwhile, Roseanne convinces Jackie to leave her abusive boyfriend.

programme.title: Roseanne: Lanford Daze
programme.desc: D.J.preps for a school play, Dan tries his hand at selling hot tubs, and Darlene demonstrates her animal rights stance by lashing out against Roseanne's business.

programme.title: Roseanne: Wait 'Til Your Father Gets Home
programme.desc: After their father dies, Roseanne and Jackie cope with their loss in very different ways.

programme.title: Roseanne: First Cousin, Twice Removed

programme.title: Roseanne: Lose a Job, Winnebago
programme.desc: In her neighbors' motor home, Roseanne spearheads a trip to Hollywood where they all attend a taping of The Jackie Thomas Show. Meanwhile, Dan is determined to convince Roseanne to have another child.

programme.title: Roseanne: It's a Boy!
programme.desc: Darlene wants her boyfriend, David, to move in with the Conners. Roseanne is against the idea until she sees what David's home life is like. Now she has to convince Dan to let him stay.

programme.title: Roseanne: It Was Twenty Years Ago Today
programme.desc: Roseanne plans to set off some sparks by surprising Dan with a sexy boudoir photograph to mark their 20th wedding anniversary. But Dan's surprise gift to Roseanne results in major marital fireworks.

programme.title: Roseanne: Playing With Matches
programme.desc: Roseanne's mom makes a new friend, Jake, at the retirement home. Now, Roseanne's playing Cupid and Jackie's planning their wedding. With special guest Red Buttons.

programme.title: Roseanne: Promises, Promises
programme.desc: Darlene and David's youthful romance takes a complicated turn when she surprises him by renting a hotel room after their senior prom. Meanwhile, Roseanne and Dan decide to invest in a friend's business scheme.

programme.title: Roseanne: Glengarry, Glen Rosey
programme.desc: The old house Roseanne and Dan fixed up to sell languishes on the market after Roger abruptly skips town.

programme.title: Roseanne: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: Darlene must choose between David and her future when she gets accepted to a college for the arts in Chicago. Roseanne gets a visit from the new health inspector: her old boss Leon.

programme.title: Roseanne: Daughters and Other Strangers
programme.desc: Dan and Roseanne decide to let Darlene go to art school in Chicago, but will Darlene leave David to pursue her future? Meanwhile, at a birthday party, 'Seven Minutes in Heaven' turns DJ into a new man.

programme.title: Roseanne: Two Down, One to Go
programme.desc: Darlene is going away to college in Chicago and, as a result, Roseanne is faced with saying goodbye to another daughter. In the hope of keeping Darlene from moving, David makes a last minute attempt and proposes marriage.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Mommy's Curse

programme.title: Roseanne: Party Politics
programme.desc: Roseanne suspects that Darlene and DJ are teaming up against her. Fred attempts to win Jackie back.

programme.desc: Steve and Amy travel to Coleraine, Minnesota, where paranormal activity threatens to tear a family apart. Everyone is under attack, mysterious shadow figures are not what they seem and the family is worried they won't survive without their help.

programme.title: The Dead Files: Never Human
programme.desc: Amy and Steve head to New Philadelphia, Ohio, where dark forces are causing a rift in a couple's marriage. Even worse, the newlyweds are under constant physical attack. They fear someone will wind up dead if they can't rid their home of the evil spirits.

programme.title: The Dead Files: Entangled
programme.desc: Steve and Amy travel to Newton, Pennsylvania, where a family claims a recent home renovation has unleashed an onslaught of paranormal activity. Everyone in the home is under attack, and they're worried they won't survive living there for much longer.

programme.title: The Dead Files: The Craving
programme.desc: Steve and Amy travel to Tucson, Arizona, where ancient supernatural forces are tormenting a retired cop and his family. Everyone in the home is under attack, and the family fears their nine-year-old may be possessed by something evil.

programme.title: The Dead Files: Deadly Intruder
programme.desc: Steve and Amy travel to Watertown, Wisconsin, where a woman claims a dark entity is threatening her once-idyllic marriage. She is convinced the spirit will kill them both if it can't be stopped.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Demons in Seattle
programme.desc: The team travels to Seattle to validate the claims that a powerful poltergeist is burning bibles and crosses, flipping heavy furniture and carving demonic symbols inside a suburban household.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Deadwood: Bullock Hotel and Wild Bill's Trading Post
programme.desc: Ghost Adventures hunt the spirit of famed slain gunslinger Wild Bill.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Black Dahlia House
programme.desc: Ghost Adventures investigate an iconic murder mystery: the Black Dahlia.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Golden Ghost Town
programme.desc: The crew travels to a sinister ghost town near Wolf Creek, Oregon. During the investigation, Zak is overtaken by an aggressive entity, Aaron is incapacitated by a dark force, eerie figures appear and a voice warns of a demonic presence.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Lewis Flats School
programme.desc: Zak and the crew land in Deming, NM, to investigate a mysterious school situated on land that is soaked with the spirits of the Apache and their violent struggle to keep it from the pioneers during the 1800s.

programme.title: Southern Charm: Who Put the 'Mad' in Madison?
programme.desc: After a raucous night in Colorado, Cameran and Whitney decide to hightail it back to Charleston while the rest of the gang hits the hot springs. When it becomes clear that Austen and Madison's road to reconciliation won't be an easy one, Shep gloats.

programme.title: Southern Charm: Outfoxed
programme.desc: Shep's ultimatum to Austen is tested after he and Madison reconcile. Meanwhile, Ashley resurfaces asking for a ‘second’ second-chance, which Eliza obliges with an invitation to her Fox Hunt.

programme.title: Southern Charm: White Gloves Off
programme.desc: The Charleston socialites get ready for another grand event hosted by Miss Patricia, and battle lines are drawn when Austen learns that Shep and Craig's dates are the girls from his infamous threesome video.

programme.title: Movie: Legally Blonde
programme.desc: When a fashion-driven sorority girl is dumped by her boyfriend, she decides to follow him to law school. Harvard doesn't know what to do when Elle and her dog take the Ivy League institution by storm.

programme.title: Movie: Legally Blonde
programme.desc: When a fashion-driven sorority girl is dumped by her boyfriend, she decides to follow him to law school. Harvard doesn't know what to do when Elle and her dog take the Ivy League institution by storm.

programme.title: Movie: Home Again
programme.desc: After separating from her husband, a mother meets three aspiring filmmakers at a club who have nowhere to live. She invites them to live in her guest house and starts a romance with one of them, a situation that is complicated when her husband shows up.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Ace of Stew Face
programme.desc: With bad weather rolling in and down her second stew, Hannah scrambles to manage the interior with only Jess to rely on. Captain Sandy and Malia draw a hard line with the deck team when they call the guys out for their questionable behaviour.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Bringing the Thunder
programme.desc: A blast from the past returns amidst a massive thunderstorm that threatens to keep the Wellington docked for their next charter. Rob and Jessica deepen their connection, while Pete's attitude continues to frustrate Malia.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Oh Snap!
programme.desc: Kiko faces his biggest challenge yet when demanding charter guests invite friends to join a six-course dinner. Hannah confronts Bugsy about their past, while Rob and Jess find their budding relationship threatened by a new revelation.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: No Mushroom for Error
programme.desc: An injured Jess fights to maintain her spot on the boat, while another crew member’s inappropriate behavior finally catches up to him. Meanwhile, high-maintenance charter guests challenge the interior and expose cracks in Hannah and Bugsy’s relationship.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Rise and Don't Shine
programme.desc: After struggling through the first day of charter, Kilo fights to regain his footing with a demanding set of charter guests. While Hannah leans on an overworked Bugsy to carry an injured Jess, Captain Sandy becomes concerned about interior's performance.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Viva, Loss Vegas
programme.desc: On a crew night out, Alex reveals his feelings to Bugsy while Hannah struggles to connect with the group. Meanwhile, Captain Sandy comes down on Jess for her performance in the laundry room, and Malia has an incident with the water toys.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Closing Time
programme.desc: Captain Sandy and Kiko find themselves at a crossroad after a critical dinner, while Hannah fights to maintain control under the weight of a stressful season. On a guest excursion into Valldemossa, Rob and Jess up the ante in their relationship.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: The crew enjoys a day off at an exclusive beach club in Mallorca, but concerns arise when Hannah stays behind to nurse an illness. Romance is in the air when Malia's boyfriend Tom arrives for a visit, while Alex takes stock of his relationship with Bugsy.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: There's No Place Like Home
programme.desc: With Hannah's back against the wall, Captain Sandy faces a difficult decision that could change the trajectory of the Wellington. Bugsy grapples with a new challenge, while Malia worries about Tom's ability to navigate a chaotic first charter.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Welcome Back
programme.desc: Down a stew in the wake of Hannah's departure, Bugsy fights to keep the interior afloat with a skeptical Jess by her side. Malia struggles to manage a frustrated deck team, while helping Tom navigate his first charter.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Whole New Ballgame
programme.desc: Baseball legend Johnny Damon returns to charter in Ibiza, putting pressure on Tom to rectify the Damons’ poor experience with the food they were served last season. With Aesha onboard, Bugsy ups her expectations for the interior team.

programme.title: Snapped: Michele Donohue

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Tesla Conspiracy
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a cutting-edge research complex built by a visionary genius, an ambitious Nazi project that met a sinister end, and a Cold War relic that changed history.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Soviet Doomsday Device
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a classified Soviet machine built to prevent all-out nuclear war, a top secret Nazi facility, and a strange tower that left an enduring legacy.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison
programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Desert Ghost Fort
programme.desc: A secret Russian military base in the Gobi Desert, a strange complex in an American wasteland, and a relic high atop a mountain are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: America's Doomsday Town
programme.desc: A strange deserted city in America's heartland, an eerie gigantic wall deep in snow-capped mountains, and a mysterious top-secret Soviet facility were built and then abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Anarchy on Ireland's Alcatraz
programme.desc: The ruins of an abandoned prison are evidence of a chaotic riot that put the prisoners in charge. Special access to its burnt-out interior reveals how inmates took over Ireland's Alcatraz and why it is deserted today.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hell on Blood Island
programme.desc: An island of dense jungle is home to an abandoned complex with a dark past of bloodshed and rebellion, and new discoveries at this deserted place reveal why it was built and the gruesome circumstances of its downfall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Ghost Towns
programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: House of Horror
programme.desc: An eerie set of buildings in Paris is evidence of an unspeakable evil. New discoveries reveal the horrific things that happened here, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Web of Lies: With Friends Like These
programme.desc: A young girl has lewd photos of her taken at a party, with no memory of the night. Her world is turned upside down and the public shaming pushes her over the edge.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Love at First Text
programme.desc: When a single mom finds her dream man online, she can't believe her luck. But her quest to meet him soon turns into every mother's worst nightmare. As police scramble to avert tragedy, they discover the most elaborate web of lies they've ever seen.

programme.title: Son of Sam: The Hunt for a Killer
programme.desc: A look into the shocking serial killings of young couples that terrorized New York 40 years ago, and the remarkable hunt to find the killer and bring him to justice, told by victims, families of the deceased and the detectives who worked the case.

programme.title: Son of Sam: The Hunt for a Killer
programme.desc: A look into the shocking serial killings of young couples that terrorized New York 40 years ago, and the remarkable hunt to find the killer and bring him to justice, told by victims, families of the deceased and the detectives who worked the case.

programme.title: BTK: Chasing a Serial Killer: Part 1
programme.desc: BTK announces his arrival by murdering four members of the same family. He claims more victims over several years while taunting police, then goes dark for two decades before resurfacing in 2004 after media stories claim that he'd been forgotten.

programme.title: BTK: Chasing a Serial Killer: Part 2
programme.desc: A new generation of law enforcement hunts the resurgent BTK, who delights in communicating with police and the media about his murders while threatening new ones. He is finally arrested, bringing relief to Wichita but shock and horror to his family.

programme.title: BTK: Chasing a Serial Killer: Part 3
programme.desc: Dennis Rader, aka BTK, confesses to ten murders and points police to the disturbing hoard of evidence against him. The depth of his depravity is revealed, along with the lasting effect he had on those in his orbit, most especially his own daughter.

programme.title: BTK: Chasing a Serial Killer: Part 1
programme.desc: BTK announces his arrival by murdering four members of the same family. He claims more victims over several years while taunting police, then goes dark for two decades before resurfacing in 2004 after media stories claim that he'd been forgotten.

programme.title: BTK: Chasing a Serial Killer: Part 2
programme.desc: A new generation of law enforcement hunts the resurgent BTK, who delights in communicating with police and the media about his murders while threatening new ones. He is finally arrested, bringing relief to Wichita but shock and horror to his family.

programme.title: Son of Sam: The Hunt for a Killer

programme.title: Son of Sam: The Hunt for a Killer
programme.desc: A look into the shocking serial killings of young couples that terrorized New York 40 years ago, and the remarkable hunt to find the killer and bring him to justice, told by victims, families of the deceased and the detectives who worked the case.

programme.title: Dark Minds: The I-70 Killer
programme.desc: In the spring of 1992 a serial killer cut a swath through the Mid West. Six victims across three states, shot execution style. The victims all worked in small stores just blocks from the I-70. Why the freeway? Why did he start, and what made him stop?

programme.title: The Atlanta Child Murders: Into the Woods
programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, a string of murders of black children are terrorizing the city of Atlanta, igniting terror and frustration from a community that feels increasingly neglected.

programme.title: The Atlanta Child Murders: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: As the weeks pass, young black males are killed with horrifying frequency. An inventive tactic finally gives law enforcement their first real lead with suspect Wayne Williams, but they lack evidence for an arrest.

programme.title: The Atlanta Child Murders: The Requiem
programme.desc: After an intense investigation, Wayne Williams goes on trial for one of the most notorious murder cases in Atlanta's history. The public struggles with the question of Williams's guilt.

programme.title: The Happy Face Killer: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: As Melissa Moore grew older, the admiration she had for her father Keith Jesperson, was replaced by fear. Her most horrific revelation would be learning how close she had come to being his next victim.

programme.title: The 93 Victims of Samuel Little: A Roadmap of Death
programme.desc: A chance phone call brings together an FBI crime analyst, a DOJ forensics expert and a Texas Ranger, who join forces in an attempt to gain a cold-case murder confession from convicted killer Samuel Little. They get much more than they ever imagined.

programme.title: The 93 Victims of Samuel Little: A Roadmap of Death
programme.desc: A chance phone call brings together an FBI crime analyst, a DOJ forensics expert and a Texas Ranger, who join forces in an attempt to gain a cold-case murder confession from convicted killer Samuel Little. They get much more than they ever imagined.

programme.title: Diabolical: Mother of All Lies
programme.desc: In 2015, Detective Scott Sanderson finds himself solving one of the strangest cases of his career. At its center are a newborn and her missing mother. Before long he'll uncover a diabolical scheme that will destroy the lives of everyone it touches.

programme.title: Diabolical: Sins of a Mother
programme.desc: In 1994, Lake Orion, Michigan is rocked by a vicious murder. At first, the crime is a mystery. But in a small town where everyone knows each other, rumors start flying. Soon, police expose a strange and twisted plot that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Diabolical: Evil Sister Act
programme.desc: When Samuel Johnson Jr. suddenly vanishes, San Antonio investigators find themselves face-to-face with two sisters who know something. Through a series of interrogations, they reveal an elaborate murder plot meticulously engineered by a puppeteer.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Work on a Crab Boat
programme.desc: Kenneth 'Speedy' Raulerson is wanted in Florida for armed robbery. He flees to Alaska to work the crab boats. After six months, he returns to the backwoods of Florida. Raulerson knows he will eventually be caught and is prepared to go down fighting.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Run With My Brother
programme.desc: Mark and Maverick Maher were punks who formed their own militia with a band of youths who robbed houses and broke into cars.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob Vacation Homes
programme.desc: William Alderman and his girlfriend broke into vacation homes and used her 3-year-old daughter to help carry out the crimes.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as a War Vet
programme.desc: Posing as a veteran and preying on women to get cash, cars, and even a house, Jerrod Durr finds himself in a multistate game of cat and mouse with cops.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Video Rental Store
programme.desc: In 1975, Michael Brown killed Richard Sullivan during a robbery. Brown was convicted, and while in prison married a woman named Donna. He soon escaped so they could start a new life together. They lived for more than 15 years without incident.

programme.title: Apocalypse: The Rise of Hitler
programme.desc: A vivid depiction of World War II, featuring rare footage from 1939, including the invasion of Poland and horrifying images from the Lodz Ghetto.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Robotic Warriors
programme.desc: Robotic Warriors are futuristic unmanned war machines that can even think for themselves. These intelligent weapon systems combine stealth and autonomy with the power to strike and destroy their targets.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Close Quarter Battle
programme.desc: Explore the chosen weapons when engaging the enemy at short range. The decision could mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Firepower
programme.desc: Take a look at some of the world's most powerful man-portable weapons. Psychological impact and the power to intimidate, firepower systems have the military capability to unleash tremendous force on the enemy.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Maximum reach makes the Sniper Rifle an Ultimate Weapon. With the accuracy and stopping power to take out small targets a mile away, the military sniper can put demands on the weapon that will achieve amazing results.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb'.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Hunt for Che Guevara
programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Super-Sized
programme.desc: Roger Mooking sets out on a culinary odyssey around the country to find the 12 best super-sized dishes. He's hanging out with chefs to learn all their secrets for creating ultimate omelets, steaks, sandwiches, seafood platters and more.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Grilled
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the best grilled dishes in restaurants across America. He's hanging out in the kitchens of fire-loving chefs to learn everything there is to know about applying heat and smoke for the tastiest chicken, beef, and more.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: West Coast Roasts
programme.desc: Visiting the Passmore Ranch in Sloughhouse, Roger must try to catch a fish by hand. Also, at the Santa Maria Elks Lodge, he will assist in building a fire pit for cooking up some beef.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Carnivore's Cookout in California
programme.desc: Roger is in central California for two meat-filled cookouts. This region is home to many vineyards, but Paso de Record Vineyard is what catches Roger's interest.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Mud and Steel in New Mexico
programme.desc: Roger heads to the heart of New Mexico where cooking with fire is taken to new culinary heights with mud and steel. Roger visits Comida de Campos in Embudo, a farm and cooking school where delicious feasts are cooked in cone-shaped clay ovens.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Small Packages, Big Flavors
programme.desc: Good things come in small packages, and that is especially true when it comes to artisanal food makers. Roger searches the Gulf Sates for tasty food with big flavor.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Global Flavors of Texas
programme.desc: Today, Roger is making his way through Texas for live-fire Latin American cooking and smoked European-style sausages.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Mexican Feast
programme.desc: Roger meets with Chef Johnny Hernandez in San Antonio, Texas and cooks regional Mexican dishes in the ultimate outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics X: Chicken Parm

programme.title: Good Eats: Immersion Therapy
programme.desc: The last decade has seen a lot of change in the food world, but no device has made more of a difference than the immersion circulator. Alton Brown makes an argument for having one in every kitchen by featuring dishes such as a perfect rump roast.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Storm Shelter Showdown: Part 1
programme.desc: The Raneys help a Missouri homestead with a hungry bear, disease-carrying ticks, no food, and no power.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Storm Shelter Showdown: Part 2
programme.desc: The Raneys help a Missouri homestead with a hungry bear, disease-carrying ticks, no food, and no power.

programme.desc: Kelley saves money by insulating her entire house with plastic. Now, she's bringing her Pilates studio into the home to save $800 per month. Pelin cuts hair and costs at her salon and must find cheap bridal party products to trim her budget.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Home is Where the Cart Is

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: The Grass is Always Cheaper

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Father Knows Debt

programme.desc: Steve’s crew battles a fiery wreck in the heart of Toronto. A newly-promoted rotator operator gest his first big test when freezing rain ices up the highway around London.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Not the Best Spot To Be
programme.desc: The Ross crew deals with a pileup on the 401. Sonny helps a drive stuck in a dangerous stretch of highway. Zach masters a difficult move for the first time.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Monster Storm Hits Europe
programme.desc: 'Great Britain's Storm of the Century' crashes into Europe, the unimaginable happens as four tornadoes touch down in Pilger, Iowa, and what lies beneath those icebergs in Greenland? Dive in and find out.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Casualties of War
programme.desc: With winter's first blow, new recruit John must save a snow plow stuck in an icy river. While Jamie pushes further into new territory, changes rock the company, forcing Colin to take on a new role. The community says farewell to a Heavy Rescue legend.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Saved on Preacher's Corner
programme.desc: Jamie's new B.C. crew struggles with a mangled trailer on a blind corner. When Colin slips up on a big recovery in Alberta, Jamie's brother must take over the job, even though he's a rookie on the rotator; Brandon steps up to a new role.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: War Zone
programme.desc: When a lumber truck and diesel tanker collide, the flaming wreckage is the biggest recovery of Colin's career. As snowstorms pummel the Coquihalla, Al Quiring heads up the hill. In freezing rain, John faces off against a mangled tractor.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Holidays Thru Hell
programme.desc: A semi plows off a bridge, leaving a trailer and three RVs dangling over a raging river. John must get holiday traffic moving and prove himself on a multi-part recovery unlike anything they've faced.

programme.title: Weird Earth: Vanishing Seas and Fog Monsters
programme.desc: A paradise beach in the Bahamas is transformed, as the ocean simply vanishes. A woman films the silhouette of a 12 foot monster lurking in the fog. Is it a Bigfoot in the mist? And a bizarre black triangle appears over Oklahoma city.

programme.title: Weird Earth: Ghost Apples and Space Jelly
programme.desc: A cigar-shaped hole in the clouds reminds Michigan locals of mysterious 'scareships' that plagued the skies of their state. How to explain ghostly ice apples that appear on a tree after a ferocious winter storm?

programme.title: Weird Earth: Ghost Ships and Blood Ice
programme.desc: A passenger on a helicopter films a weird red liquid seeping from an Antarctic glacier. A ship appears in the sky at the site of a notorious World War Two naval battle. And strange lights filmed dividing over an American city.
